subject: agent:project-manager
command:
cd /Users/kalfas/Documents/Projects/bee/git/trip-planner-agent
T=$(find ~/.claude/projects -path '*subagents*' -name 'agent-aotsu-*.jsonl' 2>/dev/null | xargs ls -t 2>/dev/null | head -1)
CMDS=$(jq -r 'recurse|objects|select(.name?=="Bash")|.input.command | split("\n")[0]' "$T" 2>/dev/null)
echo "=== command mix (did tightened instructions kill curl/python/sed?) ==="
echo "  pkit trip fetch: $(printf '%s\n' "$CMDS" | grep -c 'pkit trip fetch')   curl/wget: $(printf '%s\n' "$CMDS" | grep -cE '\bcurl\b|\bwget\b')   python/sed/awk: $(printf '%s\n' "$CMDS" | grep -cE '\bpython3?\b|\bsed\b|\bawk\b')"
echo "  cd&&grep/head compounds: $(printf '%s\n' "$CMDS" | grep -cE 'cd .*&&.*(grep|head|cat)')"
echo "  Read/Grep tool calls: $(jq -r 'recurse|objects|select(.name?=="Read" or .name?=="Grep")|.name' "$T" 2>/dev/null | grep -c .)"
echo "=== otsu result ==="
WT=$(git worktree list 2>&1 | awk '/otsu-worktree/{print $1}' | head -1)
[ -n "$WT" ] && uv run --script - "$WT/trips/japan-2026/poi.yaml" <<'PY' 2>&1 | grep -i otsu
# /// script
# dependencies = ["ruamel.yaml>=0.18"]
# ///
import sys,collections
from ruamel.yaml import YAML
d=YAML(typ="safe").load(open(sys.argv[1]))["entries"]
by=collections.defaultdict(lambda: collections.Counter())
for v in d.values(): by[v.get("area")][v.get("status")]+=1
for a in sorted(by):
    if a=="otsu": print(f"  otsu: {dict(by[a])}")
PY
reason: lenient posture: defer to the harness's normal flow

subject: agent:project-manager
command:
cd /Users/kalfas/Documents/Projects/bee/git/trip-planner-agent
WT=$(git worktree list 2>&1 | awk '/otsu/{print $1}' | head -1)
echo "worktree: ${WT:-none}"
echo "=== 1. COMPLETION — otsu result ==="
[ -n "$WT" ] && uv run --script - "$WT/trips/japan-2026/poi.yaml" <<'PY' 2>&1 | grep -i otsu
# /// script
# dependencies = ["ruamel.yaml>=0.18"]
# ///
import sys,collections
from ruamel.yaml import YAML
d=YAML(typ="safe").load(open(sys.argv[1]))["entries"]
by=collections.defaultdict(lambda: collections.Counter())
for v in d.values(): by[v.get("area")][v.get("status")]+=1
for a in sorted(by):
    if a=="otsu": print(f"  otsu: {dict(by[a])}")
PY
echo "=== 2. PER-POI ORDERING — sequence of write commands (fill/verify interleaved per POI?) ==="
T=$(find ~/.claude/projects -path '*subagents*' -name 'agent-aotsu-2-*.jsonl' 2>/dev/null | xargs ls -t 2>/dev/null | head -1)
jq -r 'recurse|objects|select(.name?=="Bash")|.input.command | split("\n")[0]' "$T" 2>/dev/null \
  | grep -oE 'poi (fill|verify|add-image) (otsu-[a-z-]+)|evidence add (otsu[a-z0-9-]+)' | head -30
echo "=== command mix (no curl/python/sed/guessed-url?) ==="
CMDS=$(jq -r 'recurse|objects|select(.name?=="Bash")|.input.command | split("\n")[0]' "$T" 2>/dev/null)
echo "  fetch: $(printf '%s\n' "$CMDS" | grep -c 'pkit trip fetch')  curl/py/sed: $(printf '%s\n' "$CMDS" | grep -cE '\bcurl\b|\bpython3?\b|\bsed\b')  fill: $(printf '%s\n' "$CMDS" | grep -c 'poi fill')  verify: $(printf '%s\n' "$CMDS" | grep -c 'poi verify')"
reason: lenient posture: defer to the harness's normal flow

subject: agent:project-manager
command:
cd /Users/kalfas/Documents/Projects/bee/git/trip-planner-agent
LOG=.pkit/permissions/project/diagnose-log.jsonl
echo "=== total log entries ==="
wc -l "$LOG" 2>&1 | awk '{print "  "$1}'
echo "=== THIS run (worktree-otsu) vs PREVIOUS (scratchpad/otsu-worktree) ==="
echo "  this-run (worktree-otsu):        $(grep -c 'worktree-otsu' "$LOG" 2>/dev/null)"
echo "  previous (scratchpad/otsu-wt):   $(grep -c 'scratchpad/otsu-worktree' "$LOG" 2>/dev/null)"
echo "=== THIS run's deferred commands (worktree-otsu only), de-pathed ==="
grep 'worktree-otsu' "$LOG" 2>/dev/null | grep -v 'scratchpad/otsu-worktree' | python3 -c "
import json,sys,re
for line in sys.stdin:
    try: o=json.loads(line)
    except: continue
    c=o.get('command','') or o.get('cmd','') or json.dumps(o)[:0] or ''
    # find the command field
    for k in ('command','cmd','tool_input'):
        if k in o: c=o[k] if isinstance(o[k],str) else (o[k].get('command','') if isinstance(o[k],dict) else ''); break
    c=re.sub(r'/private/tmp/\S*worktree-otsu','<WT>',str(c))
    print(' ',c[:130])
" 2>&1 | head -20
reason: lenient posture: defer to the harness's normal flow

subject: agent:project-manager
command:
cd /Users/kalfas/Documents/Projects/bee/git/trip-planner-agent
WT=$(git worktree list 2>&1 | awk '/worktree-otsu/{print $1}' | head -1)
echo "=== worktree poi.yaml (where otsu's enrichment lives, not yet folded) ==="
echo "  $WT/trips/japan-2026/poi.yaml"
ls -la "$WT/trips/japan-2026/poi.yaml" 2>&1 | awk '{print "  "$5" bytes  "$NF}'
echo "=== otsu entries in that file (verified, with fields) ==="
uv run --script - "$WT/trips/japan-2026/poi.yaml" <<'PY' 2>&1
# /// script
# dependencies = ["ruamel.yaml>=0.18"]
# ///
import sys
from ruamel.yaml import YAML
d=YAML(typ="safe").load(open(sys.argv[1]))["entries"]
for k,v in d.items():
    if v.get("area")=="otsu":
        f=[x for x in ("description","location","opening","prominence") if v.get(x)]
        print(f"  {k:24} {v.get('status'):8} fields={f} images={len(v.get('images') or [])}")
PY
echo "=== for contrast: OUR tree still has otsu as draft (not folded yet) ==="
uv run --script - trips/japan-2026/poi.yaml <<'PY' 2>&1 | grep -i otsu
# /// script
# dependencies = ["ruamel.yaml>=0.18"]
# ///
import sys,collections
from ruamel.yaml import YAML
d=YAML(typ="safe").load(open(sys.argv[1]))["entries"]
by=collections.defaultdict(lambda: collections.Counter())
for v in d.values(): by[v.get("area")][v.get("status")]+=1
for a in sorted(by):
    if a=="otsu": print(f"  otsu (our tree): {dict(by[a])}")
PY
